Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Class PotTable.PotTableRow

java.lang.Object
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTable.PotTableRow
Enclosing class:
PotTable
public static class PotTable.PotTableRow extends Object
Provides a fluent interface for formatting a single row in a table.

This class allows operations to be applied to all cells in a specific row. All methods return the same PotTableRow instance for method chaining.

Usage Example


 // Format the header row
 table.row(0)
     .fill(PotColor.BLUE)
     .fontColor(PotColor.WHITE)
     .bold();
Since:
1.0

    Sets the horizontal text alignment for all cells in this row.

    Applies bold formatting to text in all cells in this row.
    PotTable.PotTableRow

    Sets the bold formatting state for text in all cells in this row.

    Returns a list of all cells in this row.

  • Method Details

    • fill

      public PotTable.PotTableRow fill(PotColor color)
      Sets the background fill color for all cells in this row.
      Parameters:
      color - the color to use for the cell background fill
      Returns:
      this PotTableRow instance for method chaining

    • fontColor

      public PotTable.PotTableRow fontColor(PotColor color)
      Sets the font color for text in all cells in this row.
      Parameters:
      color - the color to use for the text
      Returns:
      this PotTableRow instance for method chaining

    • fontSize

      public PotTable.PotTableRow fontSize(double size)
      Sets the font size for text in all cells in this row.
      Parameters:
      size - the font size in points
      Returns:
      this PotTableRow instance for method chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if size is not positive

    • bold

      public PotTable.PotTableRow bold()
      Applies bold formatting to text in all cells in this row.

      This is equivalent to bold(true).

      Returns:
      this PotTableRow instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • bold(boolean)

    • bold

      public PotTable.PotTableRow bold(boolean bold)
      Sets the bold formatting state for text in all cells in this row.
      Parameters:
      bold - true to apply bold formatting, false to remove it
      Returns:
      this PotTableRow instance for method chaining

    • align

      public PotTable.PotTableRow align(PotAlignment alignment)
      Sets the horizontal text alignment for all cells in this row.
      Parameters:
      alignment - the horizontal alignment to apply
      Returns:
      this PotTableRow instance for method chaining

    • height

      public PotTable.PotTableRow height(double height)
      Sets the height of this row.
      Parameters:
      height - the new row height in points
      Returns:
      this PotTableRow instance for method chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if height is not positive

    • cells

      public List<PotTableCell> cells()
      Returns a list of all cells in this row.

      The returned list contains PotTableCell wrappers for each cell in the row, in column order (left to right).

      Returns:
      a list of all cells in this row
